title: cxxrtl: bmux does not mask the result

features.name: multiplexer input width exceeds output width
features.description: Code should include a multiplexer operation where the input data width exceeds the result width, causing truncation behavior
features.snippet:
logic [7:0] data = 8'hf1;
logic [3:0] result = sel ? data[7:4] : data[3:0];

features.name: bmux cell with oversized input
features.description: Code should include a $bmux cell where the A input has more bits than the WIDTH parameter, requiring proper result masking
features.snippet:
cell $bmux $0
  parameter \WIDTH 4
  parameter \S_WIDTH 1
  connect \A {8'11110001}
  connect \S \S
  connect \Y \Y
